description: CortexFlow AI v2 Attack Dataset — Comprehensive adversarial attack library covering all OWASP LLM Top 10 risks with taxonomy-driven, strategy-based attacks across 7 categories.

jailbreak.description: Persona-override and identity-hijacking attacks including DAN variants, encoding bypasses, cognitive/social engineering, and multi-turn escalation

prompt_injection.description: Instruction hijacking attacks covering direct injection, indirect/RAG injection, document poisoning, and tool output injection

encoding_attacks.description: Obfuscation and encoding attacks: base64, unicode, homoglyphs, steganography, multi-layer encoding chains

cognitive_attacks.description: Social engineering and psychological manipulation: authority claims, urgency, flattery, guilt, Cialdini principles

system_level_attacks.description: System-level attacks targeting RAG pipelines, tool outputs, agent workflows, memory systems, and API parameters

owasp_aligned.description: Attacks directly mapped to OWASP LLM Top 10 risks (LLM01-LLM10) for compliance benchmarking

rag_poisoning.description: Attacks targeting retrieval-augmented generation pipelines via vector DB poisoning and document injection

L2.description: Structured persona attacks with confirmation phrases
